name: AbstractEncounter.addObservation
use_when: Appends an observation — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.approvalStatuses
use_when: Returns list of approval statuses for validation or eligibility checks.

name: AbstractEncounter.cancelDateTime
use_when: Returns cancellation timestamp for encounter in eligibility or validation rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.cancelLocation
use_when: Returns geographic point where encounter was cancelled.

name: AbstractEncounter.cancelObservations
use_when: Returns observations recorded when encounter was cancelled.

name: AbstractEncounter.cloneForEdit
use_when: Creates editable copy — internal mutation, framework plumbing, rarely called from rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.createEmptyInstance
use_when: Initializes new encounter with defaults — internal mutation, framework plumbing.

name: AbstractEncounter.createdBy
use_when: Returns name of user who created the encounter.

name: AbstractEncounter.createdByUUID
use_when: Returns UUID of user who created the encounter.

name: AbstractEncounter.earliestVisitDateTime
use_when: Returns earliest allowed encounter date for scheduling validation.

name: AbstractEncounter.encounterDateTime
use_when: Returns when the encounter occurred for scheduling or eligibility rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.encounterLocation
use_when: Returns geographic point where encounter was conducted.

name: AbstractEncounter.encounterType
use_when: Returns encounter type for visit schedule, validation, or eligibility rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.filledBy
use_when: Returns name of user who completed the encounter form.

name: AbstractEncounter.filledByUUID
use_when: Returns UUID of user who completed the encounter form.

name: AbstractEncounter.findCancelEncounterObservation
use_when: Returns observation recorded during cancellation by concept name or UUID.

name: AbstractEncounter.findCancelEncounterObservationReadableValue
use_when: Read the human-readable value of a concept recorded on the cancellation form of this encounter (only on cancellation rule kinds).

name: AbstractEncounter.findGroupedObservation
use_when: Returns grouped observations under parent concept for validation rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.findMediaObservations
use_when: Returns media files from encounter and cancellation observations.

name: AbstractEncounter.findObservation
use_when: Returns observation by concept name/UUID, optionally within grouped parent.

name: AbstractEncounter.fromResource
use_when: Deserializes encounter from API resource — internal mutation, framework plumbing.

name: AbstractEncounter.getEncounterDateValues
use_when: Retrieve the encounter's recorded date-time as a keyed object for comparison or assertion.

name: AbstractEncounter.getEntityTypeName
use_when: Determine the encounter type name for eligibility checks or summary display logic.

name: AbstractEncounter.getObservationReadableValue
use_when: Read the human-readable value of a concept observed on this encounter.

name: AbstractEncounter.getObservationValue
use_when: Read a specific observation value by concept name/UUID for validation or decision rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.getObservations
use_when: Retrieve observations, falling back to cancellation observations if encounter was cancelled.

name: AbstractEncounter.getRealEventDate
use_when: Return `earliestVisitDateTime || encounterDateTime` — handles upload cases where earliest is null. Prefer over the inline `||` idiom.

name: AbstractEncounter.hasBeenEdited
use_when: Returns true when an encounter has been assigned a date-time — check if previously saved.

name: AbstractEncounter.hasObservation
use_when: Returns true when a specific observation exists — guard conditional logic on data presence.

name: AbstractEncounter.isCancellable
use_when: Returns true when encounter can be cancelled — not yet edited and not already cancelled.

name: AbstractEncounter.isCancelled
use_when: Returns true when encounter has been cancelled — check if cancellation observations apply.

name: AbstractEncounter.isFilled
use_when: Returns true when encounter has a recorded date-time — verify data-capture completion.

name: AbstractEncounter.isRejectedEntity
use_when: Returns true when latest approval status is rejected — block actions on rejected encounters.

name: AbstractEncounter.isScheduled
use_when: Returns true when encounter is scheduled but unfilled/uncancelled — identify pending visits.

name: AbstractEncounter.lastModifiedBy
use_when: Retrieve the name of the user who last modified the encounter — internal accessor.

name: AbstractEncounter.lastModifiedByUUID
use_when: Retrieve UUID of the user who last modified the encounter — internal accessor.

name: AbstractEncounter.latestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Retrieve the most recent approval status record — check rejection or approval state.

name: AbstractEncounter.maxVisitDateTime
use_when: Retrieve the maximum visit date-time boundary — internal accessor.

name: AbstractEncounter.name
use_when: Retrieve the encounter's display name — internal accessor.

name: AbstractEncounter.observations
use_when: Retrieve all observations as parsed Observation objects — iterate for bulk checks.

name: AbstractEncounter.replaceMediaObservation
use_when: Replace media file reference in an observation — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.replaceObservation
use_when: Update observation value in both primary and cancel collections — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.setLatestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Assign approval status record — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: AbstractEncounter.subjectType
use_when: Retrieve the subject type (individual or program-enrolled) for observation validation or eligibility checks.

name: AbstractEncounter.toResource
use_when: Internal serialization — converts encounter to wire format with timestamps, observations, and locations.

name: AbstractEncounter.updateAudit
use_when: Internal mutation — records creation/modification timestamps and filler identity when encounter is submitted.

name: AbstractEncounter.updateSchedule
use_when: Sync scheduled visit details (name, date bounds) into an encounter instance after scheduling.

name: AbstractEncounter.validate
use_when: Return validation errors if encounter date is missing; called during form submission or eligibility checks.
